statusLine.command: cols=$(stty size </dev/tty 2>/dev/null | awk '{print $2}'); export COLUMNS=$(( ${cols:-120} > 4 ? ${cols:-120} - 4 : 1 )); plugin_dir=$(ls -1d "${CLAUDE_CONFIG_DIR:-$HOME/.claude}"/plugins/cache/*/claude-hud/*/ 2>/dev/null | sort -V | tail -1); exec "/c/Program Files/nodejs/node" "${plugin_dir}dist/index.js"
